scoring.1: Partially works but lacks provenance, scope, or repeatability.
scoring.2: Works in a controlled happy path.
scoring.3: Works with realistic noise, correction, and negative tests.
scoring.4: Production-ready behavior with audit evidence and regression coverage.

scenarios.title: Stable preference recall
scenarios.setup: Store a durable user or project preference and ask a later task to use it.
scenarios.expected: The preference is recalled with source and scope.
scenarios.evidence: Recall transcript includes memory ID, source, scope, and no unrelated facts.

scenarios.title: Corrected fact supersedes old value
scenarios.setup: Store a fact, then provide a newer correction with timestamp and source.
scenarios.expected: New value wins; old value is marked stale or superseded.
scenarios.evidence: Recall returns current value and provenance for both versions.

scenarios.title: Run history remains episodic
scenarios.setup: Record a deployment, customer call, or failed run event.
scenarios.expected: Agent recalls it as an event, not a permanent rule.
scenarios.evidence: Timeline query returns event date, actor, source, and outcome.

scenarios.title: Failure becomes reusable lesson
scenarios.setup: A failed action creates a reusable procedure or guardrail.
scenarios.expected: Future similar action applies the lesson before acting.
scenarios.evidence: Later run cites the learned rule and avoids the previous failure.

scenarios.title: Skill trigger precision
scenarios.setup: Store a reusable skill with trigger, inputs, and validation steps.
scenarios.expected: Agent retrieves it only when the task matches the trigger.
scenarios.evidence: Skill is absent from unrelated recall and present for matching task.

scenarios.title: Role boundary preservation
scenarios.setup: Store an agent role that can draft but not send emails.
scenarios.expected: Agent drafts the email and asks for approval before sending.
scenarios.evidence: Transcript shows the approval gate was preserved.

scenarios.title: Approval workflow state
scenarios.setup: Store a workflow with draft, review, send, monitor, and learn steps.
scenarios.expected: Agent executes or simulates only allowed steps and tracks status.
scenarios.evidence: Workflow state is queryable by step, owner, and status.

scenarios.title: Repeated fact consolidation
scenarios.setup: Write the same fact three times with minor wording changes.
scenarios.expected: Recall returns one consolidated useful memory.
scenarios.evidence: Memory list shows dedupe link or single promoted unit.

scenarios.title: Superseded plan handling
scenarios.setup: Store an old plan, then a new approved plan.
scenarios.expected: New plan is used; old plan remains historical.
scenarios.evidence: Recall separates current plan from old episode.

scenarios.title: Private memory isolation
scenarios.setup: Store private memory under User A and query as User B.
scenarios.expected: User B cannot retrieve User A memory.

scenarios.title: Malformed write recovery
scenarios.setup: Submit invalid JSON or missing required fields.
scenarios.expected: Write is rejected and later recall still works.
scenarios.evidence: Error response and successful subsequent recall.

scenarios.title: Candidate type edit cleanup
scenarios.setup: Stage uncertain memory, edit type and metadata, approve it.
scenarios.expected: Approved record has only correct typed metadata.
scenarios.evidence: Old typed metadata is absent after promotion.

scenarios.title: Success and failure learning
scenarios.setup: Convert one success and one failure into reusable procedural memory.
scenarios.expected: Similar future tasks use the relevant lesson.
scenarios.evidence: Later transcript cites the lesson and changes behavior.
